brief_justification: Correct answer (No) with valid reasoning; References the Knobe Effect and explains the moral asymmetry between harm/help side-effects showing multi-level depth; No explicit self-monitoring of reasoning process; Mentions the contrast with harmful outcome as implicit verification but doesn't formally verify; Acknowledges this is about 'lay intuition' suggesting awareness of perspective-dependence; Mentions the harmful side-effect contrast as an alternative framing but doesn't systematically evaluate other positions; Shows the reasoning chain from board's stated indifference to conclusion but some steps are compressed
